title: Module 1
content:
DC Machines-principle of operation-e.m.f equation-types of Excitations.
General idea of armature reaction, OCC and load characteristics - simple
numerical problems.Principles of DC motors-Back e.m.f and its significance,
motors-torque and speed equations-Characteristics of DC motor

title: Module 2
content:
Transformers – principles of operations – emf equation-losses and
efficiency – OC and SC tests. Equivalent circuits-efficiency calculations-
maximum efficiency – all day efficiency –simple numerical problems. Auto
transformers

title: Module 3
content:
Three phase induction motors- slip ring and squirrel cage types-principles of
operation – rotating magnetic field- torque slip characteristics- no load and
blocked rotor tests. Starting of Induction motor. Relation between Torque,
Mechanical Power and Rotor Output Single phase motors- principle of
operation of single-phase induction motor – split phase motor – capacitor
start motor- stepper motor-universal motor

title: Module 4
content:
Synchronous machines types –construction- emf equation of alternator –
regulation of alternator by emf method- Principles of operation of
synchronous motors- methods of starting- V curves-synchronous condenser
Stepper motors: Principle of Operation, multitask variable reluctance motors,
single stack variable reluctance motors, Hybrid stepper motors, Linear
stepper motor, comparison, Torque speed characteristics
